title: K-200 Payload System Interface Control Document v2.0
text:
# K-200 Payload System Interface Control Document

Document number: MD-DOC-449-B. Revision: B. Type: ICD. Author: Cass Doyle. Created: 2023-09-01. Last modified: 2024-07-31. Status: Released.

## Change History
- Rev A: Initial ICD (2-axis GimbalTech gimbal baseline, 2023-09-01)
- Rev B: Updated for P-1154 Rev C 3-axis gimbal redesign per ECN-313 / ECR-216 (2024-07-31)

## §3 Camera Gimbal — P-1154 Rev C

The current camera gimbal is the Meridian Dynamics 3-axis brushless gimbal (P-1154 Rev C), replacing the original GimbalTech 2-axis unit. Change rationale: GimbalTech exhibited 8.2Hz resonance coinciding with airframe wing flutter mode 8–9Hz per DOC-407, causing image jitter of ±4° (requirement: ±0.5°). See ECR-216, WIKI-038.

Current gimbal performance (flight test, 2024-08-22): jitter ±0.09° (requirement ±0.5°). PASS.

Gimbal axes: pitch ±30°, roll ±30°, yaw ±30°. Motors: P-1155 (pitch), P-1156 (roll), P-1157 (yaw). Controller: P-1158 (SimpleBGC 32-bit extended). Driver: SRC-021 (gimbal_driver.py).

## §4 Sonar Transducer — P-1148 Rev B

AquaSound Corp broadband 100–400kHz. Mounting: P-1149 bracket at 7° downward cant. See DOC-462 (Sonar System ICD) and DRW-517. The 7° cant is safety-critical — see REV-641 (Cass Doyle review of DRW-517) for rationale.

## §5 Camera Module — P-1152

Sony IMX577 4K30fps. Lens: P-1153. Camera harness: P-1161. Driver: SRC-013 (camera_driver.py).
